title: Club World Cup Trending: World Cup Records and Match Reports
description: Search interest for "club world cup" is high in GB. Sources report on Michael Olise breaking Pelé's assist record and a high-scoring match between France and England.

sources.title: Michael Olise breaks Pelé’s World Cup assist record
France's Michael Olise, Kylian Mbappe break World Cup records
Meaningless game? Michael Olise ‘in tears’ after costly misses for France in 10-goal third-place thriller with England - but Bayern Munich star takes World Cup record from Pele

sections.heading: Search Trends
paragraphs: The term "club world cup" is trending in the GB region with a reported search lower bound of 20,000, according to the trend feed published on July 19, 2026.

sections.heading: World Cup Records
paragraphs: According to Bundesliga, Michael Olise has broken Pelé’s World Cup assist record. Sportsnet.ca reports that France's Michael Olise and Kylian Mbappé have both broken World Cup records.

sections.heading: Match Coverage
paragraphs: Goal.com reported on a 10-goal third-place match between France and England. The source noted that Bayern Munich star Michael Olise was "in tears" after costly misses, despite taking the World Cup record from Pelé.

faq.q: What records were broken according to the news sources?
faq.a: According to Bundesliga, Michael Olise broke Pelé’s World Cup assist record. Sportsnet.ca also reported that Kylian Mbappé broke a World Cup record.

faq.q: How did Goal.com describe the match between France and England?
faq.a: Goal.com described the game as a 10-goal third-place thriller and reported that Michael Olise was emotional following his performance.
